front.title: Customer MAC Address Flushing Mechanisms for Provider Backbone Bridging over VPLS

abstract.t:
The scalability of H-VPLS (either with MPLS or Ethernet access network) can be improved by incorporating Provider Backbone Bridge (PBB) functionality in VPLS access.
PBB introduces the notion of Backbone MAC (B-MAC) addresses vs. Customer MAC (C-MAC) addresses, thereby leading to the requirement for having MAC address flushing mechanisms for each.
This document discusses a C-MAC address flushing notification mechanism to be used in VPLS networks that employ PBB technology.
